name: tailscale
description: Secure remote access to your NAS

fields.name: TS_AUTHKEY
fields.label: Auth Key
fields.help: Visit the Tailscale auth keys page, generate a key, and paste it here.

fields.name: TAILSCALE_DATA_LOCATION
fields.label: Tailscale Data Folder
fields.help: Stores persistent Tailscale state so the container can reconnect after restart.

fields.name: TS_HOSTNAME
fields.label: Advertised Hostname
fields.help:
Name you want to give this device in Tailscale.
Example: UgreenDXP or MediaNAS.

fields.name: RESTART_POLICY
fields.label: Restart Policy
fields.help: Controls whether the container restarts automatically after reboot.

fields.name: EXIT_NODE_EXTRA_ARGS
fields.label: Advertise as Exit Node
fields.help:
Routes all internet traffic from selected devices through this NAS.
Requires approval in the Tailscale admin console.

fields.name: TS_ROUTES
fields.label: Advertised Routes
fields.help:
Optional subnet routes to advertise, comma-separated.
Example: 192.168.1.0/24,10.0.0.0/24.

fields.name: TS_ACCEPT_DNS
fields.label: Accept DNS
fields.help: Use Tailscale DNS so MagicDNS names work on this device.

fields.name: TS_AUTH_ONCE
fields.label: Auth Once
fields.help: If enabled, the auth key is used only for the first login when state already exists.

fields.name: TS_EXTRA_ARGS
fields.label: Extra tailscale up Arguments
fields.help:
Optional extra arguments passed to tailscale up.
Example: --accept-routes --advertise-tags=tag:nas

fields.name: TS_TAILSCALED_EXTRA_ARGS
fields.label: Extra tailscaled Arguments
fields.help: Optional extra arguments passed to the tailscaled daemon.

fields.name: TS_USERSPACE
fields.label: Userspace Networking
fields.help: Usually leave this disabled when /dev/net/tun is available.

fields.name: TAILSCALE_COMMAND
fields.label: Compose Command Override
fields.help:
Optional Docker Compose command override.
Can be a plain string or YAML list.

fields.name: TAILSCALE_ENTRYPOINT
fields.label: Compose Entrypoint Override
fields.help:
Optional Docker Compose entrypoint override.
Can be a plain string or YAML list.

fields.name: TAILSCALE_IMAGE
fields.label: Image
fields.help:
Docker image used for Tailscale.
Change this only if you want a different tag or image source.

fields.name: TAILSCALE_CONTAINER_NAME
fields.label: Container Name
fields.help: EasyDocker sets the container name from the project name.

fields.name: TAILSCALE_NETWORK_MODE
fields.label: Network Mode
fields.help: Runs with host networking so Tailscale can manage routes directly.

fields.name: TS_STATE_DIR
fields.label: State Directory Inside Container
fields.help: Recipe-managed internal state directory used by the container.

fields.name: TAILSCALE_CAP_ADD_NET_ADMIN
fields.label: Linux Capability: NET_ADMIN
fields.help: Required capability for Tailscale networking operations.

fields.name: TAILSCALE_CAP_ADD_NET_RAW
fields.label: Linux Capability: NET_RAW
fields.help: Required capability for raw socket operations.

fields.name: TAILSCALE_TUN_DEVICE
fields.label: TUN Device Mapping
fields.help: Provides access to the TUN device used by Tailscale.

ui.overview: Tailscale gives your NAS secure remote access without exposing ports to the public internet.
what_happens: A Tailscale container will be created
It will run with host networking and access to /dev/net/tun
Its persistent state will be saved in the folder you choose
You can optionally advertise subnet routes or allow this device to become an exit node
Advanced flags remain available when you need more control
ui.data_location: Stored relative to this app's config folder unless you enter an absolute path.
